note.zh: 在 Claude Code 2.1.219 中以 Claude Opus 5（High 思考档位）一次生成，未经修改，耗时 45 分钟。裸 harness 运行：全部 skills、plugins、MCP 与外部设置源均已禁用，工具只保留 Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep。单文件体素幻想世界，Three.js 从 jsdelivr/unpkg 双源回退加载。模型把代码拆成九个分片模块分别编写再拼装成单文件，并为无网络环境自制了 Three.js 打桩、PNG 编码器与测试框架，把贴图图集和地形高度图渲成 PNG 自行目视复核。
note.en: One-shot by Claude Opus 5 (High effort) in Claude Code 2.1.219, unmodified, 45 minutes. Run on a bare harness: all skills, plugins, MCP servers and external setting sources disabled, tools limited to Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Glob/Grep. A single-file voxel fantasy world; Three.js is loaded with a jsdelivr/unpkg fallback chain. The model wrote the code as nine separate module fragments and concatenated them into one file, and for the offline sandbox it built its own Three.js stub, PNG encoder and test harness, rendering the texture atlas and terrain height map to PNG for its own visual review.
